name: Geneviève
dev_strap: Terraced hillside residences above the Ionian
sub: A second-floor one-bedroom residence at the centre of Green Coast, Palasë.
description: A second-floor one-bedroom residence at the centre of Green Coast, Palasë. A calm, well-lit plan of over 92 square metres gross in the stone village quarter — steps from the central plaza, the pools and the Blue Flag beach that anchors this stretch of the Riviera.
highlights: Upper centre, on the lane down from the hotel
Pools & Blue Flag beach below the resort
location_body: Green Coast is the Albanian Riviera's most established resort address — a stone-built village above the Blue Flag beach at Palasë, where the Ceraunian mountains meet the Ionian. Mediterranean architecture in local stone, travertine and timber; promenades, pools, restaurants and a beach club below; the life of the coast a few steps from the door.
position_copy: Geneviève sits in the upper centre of the village, on the lane that leads down from the hotel. The central plaza is a short walk below, the parking entrance just beyond it, and the paths down to the beach begin at the village edge.
